title: Indie Spotlight Series #1 - BECROWNED
excerpt: BECROWNED is a psychological horror game inspired by Silent Hill, focusing on atmosphere, symbolic storytelling, and emotional dread.
author: Gamefolio Team

title: The Gamefolio Beta is Live — and You're Invited
excerpt: Create an account, post your best clips, reels and screenshots, follow the best content, and showcase what you're made of. The Gamefolio beta is open now.
author: Tom Watts

title: Indie Spotlight Series #2 - Swarm Me
excerpt: Swarm Me is a top-down survival game where you can’t fight back—you survive by dodging enemies and luring them into traps.
author: Gamefolio Team

title: Indie Spotlight Series #3 - H.A.I.N
excerpt: H.A.I.N is a co-op horror game for 1–4 players where you collect artifacts and complete a ritual to escape a cursed world—but one player secretly becomes the traitor.
author: Gamefolio Team

title: Indie Spotlight Series #4 - Cartapli Fold Quest
excerpt: Cartapli: Fold Quest is a turn-based strategy roguelike where you can fold the battlefield to reposition enemies and solve puzzles!
author: Gamefolio Team

title: Indie Spotlight Series #5 - Spartacus Blood Arena
excerpt: Spartacus: Blood Arena is a gladiator combat game where you fight through brutal arena battles, upgrade your gear, and rise through the ranks.
author: Gamefolio Team

title: Indie Spotlight Series #6 - Pick 'N Punch: The Broken World
excerpt: Pick 'N Punch: The Broken World is a brutally difficult action roguelite where mistakes are heavily punished and progress can be lost.
author: Gamefolio Team

title: Indie Spotlight Series #7 - RMF's Ragdoll Physics Experiments
excerpt: RMF’s Ragdoll Physics Experiments is a physics sandbox where you experiment with ragdoll characters and systems to create unpredictable outcomes.
author: Gamefolio Team

title: Indie Spotlight Series #8 - D3AD HAND
excerpt: D3AD HAND is a point-and-click comedy adventure set in a Soviet bunker where you must stop a nuclear launch caused by a malfunctioning system.
author: Gamefolio Team

title: Indie Spotlight Series #9 - Sports Card Shop Simulator
excerpt: Sports Card Shop Simulator is a shop management sim where you open card packs, collect rare cards, and build your own trading card business.
author: Gamefolio Team

title: Indie Spotlight Series #10 - Cup Or Die
excerpt: Cup Or Die is a psychological horror roguelite built around a deadly game of beer pong.
author: Gamefolio Team
